chat.no_conversations: No conversations yet. Start typing to create one.
chat.ai_not_configured_setup_suffix: on the API service to enable AI chat, then restart it.

chat.empty_no_context_description: I can answer questions about your analytics, generate reports, and dig into users, sessions, or pages.
chat.empty_no_context_prompt_last_seven_days_: Show me last 7 days of traffic
chat.empty_no_context_prompt_highest_bounce_r: Which pages have the highest bounce rate?
chat.empty_overview_description: I can explain trends, compare periods, or filter the page. Try a question or pick a starter.
chat.empty_overview_prompt_compare_previous_p: What changed compared to the previous period?
chat.empty_overview_prompt_last_seven_days_tr: Show me last 7 days of traffic
chat.empty_overview_prompt_top_referrers: Which referrers drove the most sessions?
chat.empty_insights_description: I can explain why an insight fired, find related ones, or walk you through the most important.
chat.empty_insights_prompt_most_important: What are the most important insights right now?
chat.empty_insights_prompt_biggest_anomaly: Explain the biggest anomaly this week
chat.empty_insights_prompt_device_trends: Any insights related to device trends?
chat.empty_pages_description: I can rank pages by performance, find declining ones, or identify entry/exit patterns.
chat.empty_pages_prompt_declining_pages: Which pages are declining vs last month?
chat.empty_pages_prompt_highest_bounce_rate: Show pages with the highest bounce rate
chat.empty_pages_prompt_top_entry_pages: Top entry pages in the last 7 days
chat.empty_seo_description: I can surface high-opportunity queries, check for cannibalization, and correlate SEO with on-site engagement.
chat.empty_seo_prompt_page_two_queries: Queries on page 2 with high impressions (easy wins)
chat.empty_seo_prompt_query_cannibalization: Any query cannibalization I should fix?
chat.empty_seo_prompt_gsc_clicks_bounce_hard: Which pages bring GSC clicks but bounce hard?
chat.empty_events_description: I can analyze distribution, correlate events, and drill into properties.
chat.empty_events_prompt_common_properties: What are the most common event properties?
chat.empty_profile_detail_description: I can summarize this profile, build a journey, or compare them to the average user.
chat.empty_profile_detail_prompt_user_journey: Tell me about this user's journey
chat.empty_profile_detail_prompt_compare_aver: How does this user compare to average?
chat.empty_session_detail_description: I can walk through the path, compare to typical sessions, or explain the referrer context.
chat.empty_session_detail_prompt_compare_typi: How does this compare to typical sessions?
chat.empty_session_detail_prompt_traffic_sour: Where did this traffic come from?
chat.empty_group_detail_description: I can show metrics, list members, and compare to peer groups.
chat.empty_group_detail_prompt_active_members: Who are the most active members?
chat.empty_report_editor_description: I can preview changes, suggest breakdowns, or compare to the previous period.
chat.empty_report_editor_prompt_useful_breakd: Suggest useful breakdowns for this report
chat.empty_report_editor_prompt_find_anomalie: Find anomalies in the current data
chat.empty_dashboard_description: I can summarize every report on this dashboard at once, flag what changed, or zoom into a single chart.
chat.empty_dashboard_prompt_compare_previous_: Compare this dashboard to the previous period
chat.empty_dashboard_prompt_biggest_change: Which report has the biggest change?
chat.empty_default_context_description: I can answer questions about the page you're viewing, generate reports, and dig into specific users, sessions, or pages.
chat.empty_default_context_prompt_visitor_cou: What's our visitor count this week?
chat.empty_default_context_prompt_top_pages_b: Show me top pages by bounce rate

settings.mcp_description: Connect any MCP-compatible AI client (Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, …) to your OpenPanel data. The server is read-only and exposes 38 tools for querying events, sessions, profiles, funnels, retention and more.

settings.mcp_raycast_description_suffix: command in Raycast — it auto-fills the form from your clipboard.
settings.widgets_realtime_description: Embed a realtime visitor counter widget on your website. The widget shows live visitor count, activity histogram, top countries, referrers and paths.

seo.empty_description: Connect Google Search Console to track your search impressions, clicks, and keyword rankings.
seo.no_search_traffic: No search traffic in this period
seo.no_ai_traffic: No AI traffic in this period
seo.cannibalization_advice_suffix: . Consider consolidating weaker pages into the top-ranking one to concentrate link equity and avoid splitting clicks.
seo.insight_low_ctr_suggestion: You are on page 1 but people rarely click. Rewrite your title tag and meta description to be more compelling and match search intent.
seo.insight_near_page_one_suggestion: A content refresh, more internal links, or a few backlinks could move this into the top 10 and dramatically increase clicks.
seo.insight_invisible_clicks_suggestion: Google shows this page a lot, but it almost never gets clicked. Consider whether the page targets the right queries or if a different format (e.g. listicle, how-to) would perform better.
seo.insight_high_bounce_headline: {{bounceRate}}% bounce rate on a page with {{sessions}} sessions
seo.insight_high_bounce_suggestion: Visitors are leaving without engaging. Check if the page delivers on its title/meta promise, improve page speed, and make sure key content is above the fold.
seo.insight_high_bounce_no_gsc_suggestion: High bounce rate with no search visibility. Review content quality and check if the page is indexed and targeting the right keywords.

onboarding.skip_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to skip onboarding? Since you do not have any projects, you will be logged out.
onboarding.project_workspace_name_help: This is the name of your workspace. It can be anything you like.
onboarding.project_tracking_required: At least one type must be selected
onboarding.project_domain_allowed_suffix: will be allowed. Do you want to allow any other?
onboarding.connect_project_missing_description: The project you are looking for does not exist. Please reload the page.
onboarding.connect_pick_framework: Or pick a framework below to get started.
onboarding.verify_faq_intro: Don't worry, this happens to everyone. Here are a few things you can check:
onboarding.verify_faq_client_id_suffix: in your snippet must match this project. Copy it here if needed:
onboarding.verify_faq_domain_description: For websites it is important that the domain is correctly configured. We authenticate requests based on the domain. Update allowed domains below:
onboarding.verify_faq_client_secret_prefix: For app and backend events you need the correct
onboarding.verify_faq_client_secret_suffix: . Copy it here if needed. Never use the client secret in web or client-side code; it would expose your credentials.
onboarding.verify_support_suffix: and we will help you out.
onboarding.testimonial_thomas_quote: OpenPanel is BY FAR the best open-source analytics I've ever seen. Better UX/UI, many more features, and incredible support from the founder.
onboarding.testimonial_julien_quote: After testing several product analytics tools, we chose OpenPanel and we are very satisfied. Profiles and Conversion Events are our favorite features.
onboarding.testimonial_piotr_quote: The Overview tab is great - it has everything I need. The UI is beautiful, clean, modern, very pleasing to the eye.
onboarding.testimonial_selfhost_quote: After paying a lot to PostHog for years, OpenPanel gives us the same - in many ways better - analytics while keeping full ownership of our data. We don't want to run any business without OpenPanel anymore.

account.email_preferences_description: Choose which types of emails you want to receive. Uncheck a category to stop receiving those emails.
account.toast_email_preferences_updated_descript: Your email preferences have been saved.
account.email_category_onboarding_description: Get started tips and guidance emails
account.email_category_weekly_digest_description: A weekly summary of your analytics with AI-surfaced insights
account.two_factor_description: Protect your account with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, etc.). You'll be asked for a 6-digit code each time you sign in with email and password.
account.two_factor_not_available_description: Your account signs in with Google or GitHub, which handle two-factor authentication in their account settings. Enable it in your provider's security settings.

billing.trial_ends_description: Your trial ends on {{date}}. When it ends, your dashboards pause until you choose a plan — your data keeps flowing in.
billing.toast_subscription_updated_description: It might take a few seconds to update
billing.plan_current_usage: Your current usage is {{count}} out of {{limit}} events.
billing.plan_downgrade_limit_notice: You cannot downgrade if your usage exceeds the limit of the new plan.
billing.status_subscription_will_cancel_on: Your subscription will be canceled on {{date}}
billing.status_payment_failed: Your last payment failed — please update your payment method.
billing.faq_free_tier_question: Does OpenPanel have a free tier?
billing.faq_free_tier_answer_trial: For our Cloud plan we offer a 30 days free trial, this is mostly for you to be able to try out OpenPanel before committing to a paid plan.
billing.faq_free_tier_answer_self_host: OpenPanel is also open-source and you can self-host it for free!
billing.faq_free_tier_answer_why_title: Why does OpenPanel not have a free tier?
billing.faq_free_tier_answer_why_body: We want to make sure that OpenPanel is used by people who are serious about using it. We also need to invest time and resources to maintain the platform and provide support to our users.
billing.faq_exceeds_limit_question: What happens if my site exceeds the limit?
billing.faq_exceeds_limit_answer: You will not see any new events in OpenPanel until your next billing period. If this happens 2 months in a row, we'll advice you to upgrade your plan.
billing.faq_cancel_subscription_question: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
billing.faq_cancel_subscription_answer_access: If you cancel your subscription, you will still have access to OpenPanel until the end of your current billing period. You can reactivate your subscription at any time.
billing.faq_cancel_subscription_answer_data: After your current billing period ends, you will not get access to new data.
billing.faq_cancel_subscription_answer_note: NOTE: If your account has been inactive for 3 months, we'll delete your events.
billing.faq_billing_information_question: How do I change my billing information?
billing.faq_billing_information_answer: You can change your billing information by clicking the "Customer portal" button in the billing section.
billing.faq_custom_plan_question: We need a custom plan, can you help us?
billing.faq_custom_plan_answer: Yes, we can help you with that. Please contact us at hello@openpanel.dev to request a quote.
billing.prompt_trial_ended_lead: Thanks for trying OpenPanel. Everything you set up is still here: your projects, your reports, and every event you tracked. Pick a plan and your dashboards are live again in about a minute.
billing.prompt_trial_ended_note: We keep collecting your incoming events for now, so nothing is lost while you decide.
billing.prompt_expired_title: Your data is right where you left it
billing.prompt_expired_lead: Your subscription ended, but we haven't deleted anything. Reactivate and your dashboards, reports, and events are back immediately.
billing.prompt_unpaid_title: Your last payment didn't go through
billing.prompt_unpaid_lead: Usually it's an expired card or a bank block, and it takes a minute to fix. Update your payment method and your dashboards come straight back. Your data hasn't gone anywhere.
billing.prompt_free_plan_lead: We'd rather run a small, sustainable service than a free one we can't support properly. Paid plans start at $2.5/month and your data carries over as-is.
billing.prompt_events_tracked_label: Events tracked, all safe and stored
billing.prompt_usage_recommendation_suffix: plan covers you: up to {{events}} events per month for {{price}}.
billing.prompt_custom_plan_description: Your usage is above our standard plans, so let's set you up with a custom one.

report_chart.dropoff_hint: dropped after this event. Improve this step and your conversion rate will likely increase.
